datasets.name: ds_filter_year
queryLines: SELECT DISTINCT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_revenue ORDER BY fiscal_year DESC

datasets.name: ds_filter_quarter
queryLines: SELECT DISTINCT `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_revenue ORDER BY fiscal_quarter

datasets.name: ds_filter_bu
queryLines: SELECT DISTINCT `Business Unit` AS business_unit FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_revenue ORDER BY business_unit

datasets.name: ds_filter_region
queryLines: SELECT DISTINCT `Region` AS region FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_revenue ORDER BY region

datasets.name: ds_rev_scenario_qtr
queryLines: SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, `Scenario` AS scenario_name, ROUND(MEASURE(`Revenue`), 0) AS revenue_usd, ROUND(MEASURE(`YoY Growth Pct`), 1) AS yoy_growth_pct, ROUND(MEASURE(`Budget Variance Pct`), 1) AS budget_variance_pct FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_revenue GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_ebitda_qtr
queryLines: SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, `Scenario` AS scenario_name, ROUND(MEASURE(`Revenue`), 0) AS revenue, ROUND(MEASURE(`COGS`), 0) AS cogs, ROUND(MEASURE(`Gross Profit`), 0) AS gross_profit, ROUND(MEASURE(`OpEx`), 0) AS opex, ROUND(MEASURE(`EBITDA`), 0) AS ebitda, ROUND(MEASURE(`EBITDA Margin`) * 100, 1) AS ebitda_margin_pct FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_ebitda GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_cash_qtr
queryLines: SELECT c.fiscal_year, c.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown') AS business_unit, c.region, ROUND(SUM(c.operating_cf), 0) AS operating_cf, ROUND(SUM(c.capex), 0) AS capex, ROUND(SUM(c.fcf), 0) AS fcf, ROUND(AVG(c.fcf_conversion_pct), 1) AS fcf_conversion_pct FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_cash_flow_summary c LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.silver_dim_entity e ON c.entity_name = e.entity_name AND c.region = e.region GROUP BY c.fiscal_year, c.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown'), c.region

datasets.name: ds_cash_metrics_long
queryLines: SELECT c.fiscal_year, c.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown') AS business_unit, c.region, 'Operating CF' AS metric, ROUND(SUM(c.operating_cf), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_cash_flow_summary c LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.silver_dim_entity e ON c.entity_name = e.entity_name AND c.region = e.region GROUP BY c.fiscal_year, c.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown'), c.region UNION ALL SELECT c.fiscal_year, c.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown') AS business_unit, c.region, 'CapEx' AS metric, ROUND(SUM(c.capex), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_cash_flow_summary c LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.silver_dim_entity e ON c.entity_name = e.entity_name AND c.region = e.region GROUP BY c.fiscal_year, c.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown'), c.region UNION ALL SELECT c.fiscal_year, c.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown') AS business_unit, c.region, 'FCF' AS metric, ROUND(SUM(c.fcf), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_cash_flow_summary c LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.silver_dim_entity e ON c.entity_name = e.entity_name AND c.region = e.region GROUP BY c.fiscal_year, c.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown'), c.region

datasets.name: ds_leverage_qtr
queryLines: SELECT l.fiscal_year, l.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown') AS business_unit, COALESCE(e.region, 'Unknown') AS region, ROUND(AVG(l.net_leverage), 2) AS net_leverage, ROUND(AVG(l.interest_coverage), 2) AS interest_coverage FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_leverage_metrics l LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.silver_dim_entity e ON l.entity_id = e.entity_id GROUP BY l.fiscal_year, l.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown'), COALESCE(e.region, 'Unknown')

datasets.name: ds_wc_qtr
queryLines: SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, ROUND(MEASURE(`DSO`), 1) AS dso, ROUND(MEASURE(`DPO`), 1) AS dpo, ROUND(MEASURE(`Inventory Turns`), 2) AS inventory_turns, ROUND(MEASURE(`Cash Conversion Cycle`), 1) AS ccc FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_working_capital GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_ebitda_bridge_steps
queryLines: SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, `Scenario` AS scenario_name, 'Revenue' AS step, ROUND(MEASURE(`Revenue`), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_ebitda WHERE `Scenario` = 'Actual' GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, `Scenario` AS scenario_name, 'COGS' AS step, ROUND(-MEASURE(`COGS`), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_ebitda WHERE `Scenario` = 'Actual' GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, `Scenario` AS scenario_name, 'Gross Profit' AS step, ROUND(MEASURE(`Gross Profit`), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_ebitda WHERE `Scenario` = 'Actual' GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, `Scenario` AS scenario_name, 'OpEx' AS step, ROUND(-MEASURE(`OpEx`), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_ebitda WHERE `Scenario` = 'Actual' GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, `Scenario` AS scenario_name, 'EBITDA' AS step, ROUND(MEASURE(`EBITDA`), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_ebitda WHERE `Scenario` = 'Actual' GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_wc_metric_qtr
queryLines: SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, 'DSO' AS metric, ROUND(MEASURE(`DSO`), 1) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_working_capital GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, 'DPO' AS metric, ROUND(MEASURE(`DPO`), 1) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_working_capital GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, 'CCC' AS metric, ROUND(MEASURE(`Cash Conversion Cycle`), 1) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_working_capital GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_orders_qtr
queryLines: SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, fiscal_month, CONCAT(CAST(fiscal_year AS STRING), '-', LPAD(CAST(fiscal_month AS STRING), 2, '0')) AS period, business_unit, region, ROUND(SUM(order_intake), 0) AS order_intake, ROUND(SUM(backlog_value), 0) AS backlog_value, ROUND(SUM(shipped_revenue), 0) AS shipped_revenue, ROUND(AVG(book_to_bill_ratio), 2) AS book_to_bill_ratio FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_order_backlog GROUP BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, fiscal_month, CONCAT(CAST(fiscal_year AS STRING), '-', LPAD(CAST(fiscal_month AS STRING), 2, '0')), business_unit, region

datasets.name: ds_aftermarket_qtr
queryLines: SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, ROUND(MEASURE(`Aftermarket Mix Pct`), 1) AS aftermarket_mix_pct, ROUND(MEASURE(`Service Attach Rate`) * 100, 1) AS service_attach_rate_pct FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_aftermarket GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_order_metrics_long
queryLines: SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region, 'Order Intake' AS metric, ROUND(SUM(order_intake), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_order_backlog GROUP BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region UNION ALL SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region, 'Shipped Revenue' AS metric, ROUND(SUM(shipped_revenue), 0) AS value FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_order_backlog GROUP BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region

datasets.name: ds_forecast_monthly
queryLines: WITH base AS (SELECT f.entity_id, f.forecast_month, CAST(SUBSTRING(f.forecast_month, 1, 4) AS INT) AS fiscal_year, CONCAT('Q', CAST(CEIL(CAST(SUBSTRING(f.forecast_month, 6, 2) AS INT) / 3.0) AS STRING)) AS fiscal_quarter, e.business_unit, e.region, f.predicted_revenue, f.prediction_interval_lower, f.prediction_interval_upper, COALESCE(r.revenue_usd, 0) AS actual_revenue FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.ml_revenue_forecast f LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.silver_dim_entity e ON f.entity_id = e.entity_id LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_revenue_summary r ON e.business_unit = r.business_unit AND e.region = r.region AND f.forecast_month = CONCAT(r.fiscal_year, '-', LPAD(r.fiscal_month, 2, '0')) AND r.scenario_name = 'Actual') SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region, forecast_month, ROUND(SUM(predicted_revenue), 0) AS predicted_revenue, ROUND(SUM(actual_revenue), 0) AS actual_revenue, ROUND(SUM(prediction_interval_lower), 0) AS prediction_interval_lower, ROUND(SUM(prediction_interval_upper), 0) AS prediction_interval_upper, ROUND(AVG(ABS(predicted_revenue - actual_revenue) / NULLIF(actual_revenue, 0)) * 100, 1) AS mape_pct, ROUND(AVG((predicted_revenue - actual_revenue) / NULLIF(actual_revenue, 0)) * 100, 1) AS forecast_vs_actual_pct FROM base GROUP BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region, forecast_month

datasets.name: ds_forecast_series_long
queryLines: WITH base AS (SELECT CAST(SUBSTRING(f.forecast_month, 1, 4) AS INT) AS fiscal_year, CONCAT('Q', CAST(CEIL(CAST(SUBSTRING(f.forecast_month, 6, 2) AS INT) / 3.0) AS STRING)) AS fiscal_quarter, e.business_unit, e.region, f.forecast_month, f.predicted_revenue, COALESCE(r.revenue_usd, 0) AS actual_revenue FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.ml_revenue_forecast f LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.silver_dim_entity e ON f.entity_id = e.entity_id LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_revenue_summary r ON e.business_unit = r.business_unit AND e.region = r.region AND f.forecast_month = CONCAT(r.fiscal_year, '-', LPAD(r.fiscal_month, 2, '0')) AND r.scenario_name = 'Actual') SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region, forecast_month, 'Predicted' AS series, ROUND(SUM(predicted_revenue), 0) AS value FROM base GROUP BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region, forecast_month UNION ALL SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region, forecast_month, 'Actual' AS series, ROUND(SUM(actual_revenue), 0) AS value FROM base GROUP BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region, forecast_month

datasets.name: ds_risk_flags
queryLines: SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, business_unit, region, risk_item, status, metric_value, threshold FROM (SELECT l.fiscal_year, l.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown') AS business_unit, COALESCE(e.region, 'Unknown') AS region, 'Leverage Covenant' AS risk_item, CASE WHEN AVG(l.net_leverage) > 3.5 THEN 'Alert' ELSE 'On Track' END AS status, ROUND(AVG(l.net_leverage), 2) AS metric_value, 3.5 AS threshold FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_leverage_metrics l LEFT JOIN nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.silver_dim_entity e ON l.entity_id = e.entity_id GROUP BY l.fiscal_year, l.fiscal_quarter, COALESCE(e.business_unit, 'Unknown'), COALESCE(e.region, 'Unknown') UNION ALL SELECT w.fiscal_year, w.fiscal_quarter, w.business_unit, w.region, 'DSO Overrun' AS risk_item, CASE WHEN AVG(w.dso) > 60 THEN 'Alert' ELSE 'On Track' END AS status, ROUND(AVG(w.dso), 1) AS metric_value, 60.0 AS threshold FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_working_capital w GROUP BY w.fiscal_year, w.fiscal_quarter, w.business_unit, w.region UNION ALL SELECT b.fiscal_year, b.fiscal_quarter, b.business_unit, b.region, 'Margin Compression' AS risk_item, CASE WHEN AVG(b.ebitda_margin) < 0.15 THEN 'Alert' ELSE 'On Track' END AS status, ROUND(AVG(b.ebitda_margin) * 100, 1) AS metric_value, 15.0 AS threshold FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_ebitda_bridge b WHERE b.scenario_name='Actual' GROUP BY b.fiscal_year, b.fiscal_quarter, b.business_unit, b.region) t

datasets.name: ds_plant_perf
queryLines: SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, 'Operations' AS business_unit, CASE WHEN plant_country IN ('US','CA','MX','Brazil') THEN 'Americas' WHEN plant_country IN ('Germany','France','UK','Italy','Spain') THEN 'Europe' WHEN plant_country IN ('China','Japan','India','Korea') THEN 'Asia' ELSE 'Other' END AS region, plant_name, plant_country, ROUND(AVG(utilization_pct) * 100, 1) AS utilization_pct, ROUND(AVG(cost_variance_pct), 1) AS cost_variance_pct, ROUND(AVG(scrap_rate) * 100, 1) AS scrap_rate, ROUND(SUM(total_units), 0) AS total_units FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.gold_plant_performance GROUP BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, plant_name, plant_country

datasets.name: ds_rev_actual_qtr
queryLines: SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, ROUND(MEASURE(`Revenue`), 0) AS revenue_usd, ROUND(MEASURE(`YoY Growth Pct`), 1) AS yoy_growth_pct, ROUND(MEASURE(`Budget Variance Pct`), 1) AS budget_variance_pct FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_revenue WHERE `Scenario` = 'Actual' GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_ebitda_actual_qtr
queryLines: SELECT `Fiscal Year` AS fiscal_year, `Fiscal Quarter` AS fiscal_quarter, `Business Unit` AS business_unit, `Region` AS region, ROUND(MEASURE(`Revenue`), 0) AS revenue, ROUND(MEASURE(`COGS`), 0) AS cogs, ROUND(MEASURE(`Gross Profit`), 0) AS gross_profit, ROUND(MEASURE(`OpEx`), 0) AS opex, ROUND(MEASURE(`EBITDA`), 0) AS ebitda, ROUND(MEASURE(`EBITDA Margin`) * 100, 1) AS ebitda_margin_pct, ROUND(CASE WHEN MEASURE(`Revenue`) <> 0 THEN (MEASURE(`Gross Profit`) / MEASURE(`Revenue`)) * 100 END, 2) AS gross_margin_pct FROM nova_molding_demo.fpa_dev.mv_ebitda WHERE `Scenario` = 'Actual' GROUP BY ALL

lines: # CFO-Level FP&A Dashboard**Revenue, profitability, cash, and forecast performance**

frame.title: Revenue Trend (Actual vs Budget vs Forecast)

lines: # Revenue & Profitability**Actual vs plan performance and margin drivers**
# Cash, Leverage & Working Capital**Liquidity, debt, and operating cycle management**
# Orders, Backlog & Aftermarket**Demand momentum, pipeline quality, and service mix**
# ML Forecast & Risk**Forward-looking outlook with automated risk flags**
